title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at ID Fresh Food
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
